findings.issue: Round 1 finding on Task 8 vs Task 9 (layout/page integration) was not explicitly addressed — both still sit in Wave 4. They modify disjoint files (app.vue/layouts vs pages/auth/*), so there is no merge conflict, but the logical dependency (Task 9 pages render under layouts touched by Task 8) remains implicit. Acceptable since pages do not embed LangSwitcher directly, but flagging that the rewriter did not add a note.
findings.fix: Optional: add a one-line clarification to Task 9 description that LangSwitcher lives in the layout (Task 8) so pages stay layout-agnostic. Not blocking.

findings.issue: Task 7 (auth middleware refactor) has no Verify-smoke nor Verify-user. Middleware is purely internal logic covered by unit tests, which the criteria say is acceptable to omit, but a quick `pnpm dev` + `curl -sI -L localhost:3000/en/dashboard` (unauthed → 302 to /en/auth/login) smoke would catch locale-aware redirect regressions cheaply.
findings.fix: Optional: add Verify-smoke `cd frontend && pnpm dev` + curl checks: unauthed `/dashboard` → 302 `/auth/login`; unauthed `/en/dashboard` → 302 `/en/auth/login`.

summary: Round 2 PASS. Wave 1 conflict resolved (Task 1 solo, Tasks 2 and 3 moved to Wave 2 with disjoint files). Task 10 line-number references removed. Task 4 namespace enumeration trimmed and references Decision 8. Task 3 Verify-smoke aligned with Decision 5 (allow-list ['en'], uk stripped). Task 6 Verify-user added. Task 11 smoke includes `--list`. Task 14 pre-justification trimmed to scope. Task 2 rationale duplication reduced. No new wave conflicts: Wave 2 (Tasks 2/3) modify disjoint files, Wave 3 (Tasks 4-7) modify disjoint files, Wave 4 (Tasks 8-10) modify disjoint files. Task count = 15 (at cap). All skills match catalog (`infrastructure-setup`, `code-writing`, `code-reviewing`, `security-auditor`, `test-master`, `pre-deploy-qa`). All reviewers match catalog. All 17 Decisions have Decision/Rationale/Alternatives/Anchored-to. Frontmatter valid (created 2026-05-08, status draft, branch dev, size M). No time-based estimates. Two minor optional improvements remain (Task 7 smoke, Task 8/9 dependency note) — neither blocks approval.
